retry_reason: Failure (vma null or load_err_log already set) is a no-op; conditions are stable after initialization, so retrying is pointless unless the caller changes the state externally.
contract_summary: This function conditionally acquires a reference on the GuC log buffer object and stores it in uc->load_err_log for post-failure error retrieval. It is a one-time capture, gated by the presence of the GuC log VMA and the absence of a previously captured log. The caller must later release the reference via i915_gem_object_put() on uc->load_err_log when the log is no longer needed. No return value is provided; the caller should check whether uc->load_err_log is non-NULL to determine if the capture succeeded.
